user.title: Ontario Energy Pricing Setup
user.description:
Configure your Ontario Energy Pricing integration.

This integration tracks:
- Current LMP (Locational Marginal Price)
- 24-hour average LMP
- Global Adjustment
- Total Rate (LMP + GA + Admin Fee)

zone_select.title: Select Zone
zone_select.description: Choose the electricity zone for your location. Select 'ONTARIO' for province-wide average pricing.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key - please check your GridStatus API key
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to API - check network and API availability

abort.already_configured: Ontario Energy Pricing is already configured for {location} ({zone}). Remove the existing configuration to add a new one.
